issue_title: Don't open Popup while clicking on a layer while drawing
issue_body_preview:
> By the way - for me this works only if I don't have `pmIgnore` set on the layers. But the problem I have is that I require `pmIgnore` so that my `readOnly` layers are not being accidently deleted or edited. Any ideas?

_Originally posted by @edudins in https://github.com/geoman-io/leaflet-geoman
test_description_zh: 在地图上添加带有 Popup 的图层（设置 pmIgnore 属性），然后激活绘制模式（如绘制多边形或折线），在绘制过程中点击已有的带 Popup 的图层，观察 Popup 是否弹出以及绘制流程是否被中断。
expected_result_zh: 在绘制模式激活期间，点击已有的带 Popup 的图层时，Popup 不应弹出，绘制操作应正常继续，不会被打断。
